citation: Freddie SF Seller/Servicer Guide §4203.4 (Credit Fee Cap numeric assertion)
comment: Hand-calc: credit_score=680 -> '680-699'; LTV=80 -> '75.01-80'; primary, cash_out_refi, 1-unit. Base eligible=true, credit_fee_bps=175 + cash_out 275 + 0 + 0 = 450 bps. Confirms Decimal-from-string discipline holds across YAML -> loader -> predicate -> output (no precision drift).
